glosses.vi: điện thoại di động; di động
glosses.ja: 携帯電話; ポータブル

translations.he: אני אוהב את הקונסולה הניידת שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi rất thích máy chơi game cầm tay của mình.
translations.ar: أنا أحب جهاز الألعاب المحمول الخاص بي.
translations.nl: Ik ben dol op mijn draagbare spelconsole.
translations.hi: मुझे अपनी हैंडहेल्ड गेम कंसोल बहुत पसंद है.
translations.nb: Jeg elsker den håndholdte spillkonsollen min.
translations.id: Saya sangat menyukai konsol gim genggam saya.
translations.ro: Îmi place foarte mult consola mea portabilă.
translations.ja: 携帯ゲーム機が大好きです。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular subject clitic pronoun, elided before a vowel-initial verb.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; agrees with the subject pronoun.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular; agrees with the noun it modifies ('console').
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the noun phrase 'ma console portable'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'console'; denotes the property 'handheld/portable'.

sentences.target: On prend l'ordinateur portable au café.

translations.fr: On prend l'ordinateur portable au café.
translations.en: We’re taking the laptop to the café.
translations.es: Vamos a llevar el portátil al café.
translations.de: Wir nehmen den Laptop mit ins Café.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把笔记本电脑带到咖啡馆。
translations.yue: 我哋帶手提電腦去咖啡店。
translations.pt: Vamos levar o notebook ao café.
translations.he: אנחנו לוקחים את המחשב הנייד לבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi mang laptop đến quán cà phê.
translations.ar: نحن نأخذ الكمبيوتر المحمول إلى المقهى.
translations.nl: We nemen de laptop mee naar het café.
translations.hi: हम लैपटॉप कैफ़े में ले जा रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi tar med laptopen til kafeen.
translations.sv: Vi tar med laptopen till kaféet.
translations.da: Vi tager den bærbare med på café.
translations.ja: ノートパソコンをカフェに持っていきます。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun (often used for 'we'); syntactically 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; agrees with 'On'.
Definite article, elided before a vowel-initial noun; here masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the noun phrase 'l'ordinateur portable'.
Postposed adjective modifying 'ordinateur'; denotes a laptop.
Preposition 'à' contracted with 'le' (= 'au'); introduces a locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Ma batterie portable se recharge lentement.

translations.fr: Ma batterie portable se recharge lentement.
translations.en: My portable battery is recharging slowly.
translations.es: Mi batería portátil se está cargando lentamente.
translations.de: Meine Powerbank lädt sich langsam auf.
translations.it: La mia batteria portatile si ricarica lentamente.
translations.ko: 제 보조 배터리가 천천히 충전되고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的充电宝正在慢慢充电。
translations.yue: 我嘅流動電源充電得好慢。
translations.vi: Pin dự phòng của tôi đang sạc rất chậm.
translations.hi: मेरी पोर्टेबल बैटरी धीमे चार्ज हो रही है.
translations.pl: Moja bateria przenośna ładuje się powoli.
translations.el: Η φορητή μου μπαταρία φορτίζεται αργά.
translations.id: Power bank saya sedang mengisi daya dengan lambat.
translations.ro: Bateria mea portabilă se încarcă încet.
translations.cs: Moje přenosná baterie se nabíjí pomalu.
translations.ja: 私のモバイルバッテリーはゆっくり充電されています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine singular; agrees with 'batterie'.
Common noun, feminine singular; subject of the clause.
Attributive adjective modifying 'batterie'.
Reflexive clitic pronoun marking the pronominal verb 'se recharger'; 3rd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; used pronominally with 'se'.
Adverb of manner modifying the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Ils achètent une enceinte portable pour la fête.
sentences.reading: /il zaʃɛt yn ɑ̃sɛ̃t pɔʁtabl puʁ la fɛt/

translations.fr: Ils achètent une enceinte portable pour la fête.
translations.ipa: /il zaʃɛt yn ɑ̃sɛ̃t pɔʁtabl puʁ la fɛt/
translations.en: They’re buying a portable speaker for the party.
translations.es: Están comprando un altavoz portátil para la fiesta.
translations.de: Sie kaufen einen tragbaren Lautsprecher für die Party.
translations.it: Stanno comprando un altoparlante portatile per la festa.
translations.ko: 그들은 파티를 위해 휴대용 스피커를 사고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在为派对买一个便携式音箱。
translations.yue: 佢哋為派對買一個便攜式喇叭。
translations.ru: Они покупают портативную колонку для вечеринки.
translations.pt: Eles estão comprando uma caixa de som portátil para a festa.
translations.tr: Parti için taşınabilir hoparlör satın alıyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ đang mua loa di động cho bữa tiệc.
translations.ar: إنهم يشترون مكبر صوت محمول للحفلة.
translations.nl: Ze kopen een draagbare luidspreker voor het feestje.
translations.uk: Вони купують портативну колонку для вечірки.
translations.hu: Vesznek egy hordozható hangszórót a bulira.
translations.hi: वे पार्टी के लिए पोर्टेबल स्पीकर खरीद रहे हैं.
translations.el: Αγοράζουν ένα φορητό ηχείο για το πάρτι.
translations.nb: De kjøper en बærbar høyttaler til festen.
translations.id: Mereka sedang membeli speaker portabel untuk pesta.
translations.sv: De köper en portabel högtalare till festen.
translations.ro: Ei cumpără un difuzor portabil pentru petrecere.
translations.da: De køber en bærbar højttaler til festen.
translations.ja: 彼らはパーティーのためにポータブルスピーカーを買っています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun; masculine or mixed gender.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; agrees with 'Ils'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces the noun 'enceinte'.
Common noun, feminine singular; here denotes an audio speaker; head of the noun phrase.
Postposed adjective modifying 'enceinte'.
Preposition introducing a purpose complement.
Definite article, feminine singular; determines 'fête'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.
